module_info.docstring:
Embedding client — shared across interject, tldr-swinton, and intercache.

Loads sentence-transformers model locally. Default: nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5 (768d).
The legacy all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384d) model is still supported via model_name parameter.

classes.name: EmbeddingClient
classes.docstring: Text -> vector embeddings with lazy model loading.

methods.name: dim
methods.docstring: Embedding dimension for the current model.

methods.name: embed
methods.docstring: Embed a single text. Returns normalized vector.

methods.name: embed_batch
methods.docstring: Embed multiple texts. Returns (N, dim) normalized array.

methods.name: cosine_similarity
methods.docstring: Cosine similarity between two normalized vectors.

functions.name: vector_to_bytes
functions.docstring: Serialize numpy vector to bytes for SQLite blob storage.

functions.name: bytes_to_vector
functions.docstring: Deserialize bytes from SQLite back to numpy vector.
